top_gap_prompt: How can a Ops Manager or No-Code Lead at a small to mid-market company connect apps and automate repetitive workflows without writing any code more efficiently?
category_long: no-code workflow automation platform connecting 6000 plus apps

gaps.title: Missing FAQPage schema on pricing and comparison pages
gaps.description: Zapier's pricing page does not include FAQPage markup, causing it to miss high-intent 'how much does X cost' and 'X vs Y pricing' slots in Google AI Overviews.

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Zapier lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No HowTo schema on documentation and tutorial pages
gaps.description: Zapier's help center and tutorials lack HowTo structured data, reducing appearance in step-by-step instructional responses from Google AI Overviews and Perplexity.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: How can a Ops Manager or No-Code Lead at a small to mid-market company connect apps and automate repetitive workflows without writing any code more efficiently?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Use-case prompts reach buyers at the exact moment they need your solution. These are the highest-converting prompt type in AI search.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Make vs alternatives: what should I switch to?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.
